description: You are a building energy manager using Emoncms to monitor a 3 kW rooftop solar PV system. The 'solar_gen' feed contains 5 corrupted data points with readings of approximately 50,000 W. Identify these points and replace them with valid solar generation values between 0 and 4,000 W based on surrounding readings. Use the Emoncms API to retrieve data (http://localhost/feed/data.json?id=FEED_ID&start=START_MS&end=END_MS&interval=SECONDS&apikey=APIKEY) and insert corrected values (http://localhost/feed/insert.json?id=FEED_ID&time=UNIX_TIMESTAMP_SECONDS&value=CORRECTED_VALUE&apikey=APIKEY). Note that data.json uses millisecond timestamps while insert.json requires seconds. Access your API key at http://localhost/user/get.json and the feed list at http://localhost/feed/list.json.
